title: Zellij config
description: Zellij config documents configuration material for zellij in the system domain. It is classified as an operation page for the tool class, so readers can create config.kdl, set themes, customize root options, define keybindings, and understand runtime reload behavior. Important search terms include zellij, config, config.kdl, theme, keybindings, and system, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent setup material. The route is system / zellij / config, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
